1: In those days was Hezekiah sick unto death. And Isaiah the prophet the son of Amoz came unto him, and said unto him, Thus saith the LORD LORD , Set thine house in order: for thou shalt die, and not live.
2: Then Hezekiah turned his face toward the wall, and prayed unto the LORD LORD ,
3: and said, Remember now, O LORD LORD , I beseech thee, how I have walked before thee in truth and with a perfect heart, and have done that which is that which is good in thy sight. And Hezekiah wept sore.
4: Then came the word of the LORD LORD to Isaiah, saying,
5: Go, and say to Hezekiah, Thus saith the LORD LORD , the God of David thy father, I have heard thy prayer, I have seen thy tears: behold, I will add unto thy days fifteen years.
6: And I will deliver thee and this city out of the hand of the king of Assyria: and I will defend this city.
7: And this shall be shall be a sign unto thee from the LORD LORD , that the LORD LORD will do this thing that he hath spoken;
8: Behold, I will bring again the shadow of the degrees, which is gone down in the sun dial of Ahaz, ten degrees backward. So the sun returned ten degrees, by which degrees it was gone down.
9: The writing of Hezekiah king of Judah, when he had been sick, and was recovered of his sickness:
10: I am deprived of the residue of my years.
11: I shall behold man no more with the inhabitants of the world.
12: From day even even to night wilt thou make an end of me.
13: From day even even to night wilt thou make an end of me.
14: O LORD LORD , I am oppressed; undertake for me.
15: I shall go softly all my years in the bitterness of my soul.
16: So wilt thou recover me, and make me to live.
17: For thou hast cast all my sins behind thy back.
18: They that go down into the pit cannot hope for thy truth.
19: The father to the children shall make known thy truth.
20: All the days of our life in the house of the LORD LORD .
21: For Isaiah had said, Let them take a lump of figs, and lay it it for a plaister upon the boil, and he shall recover.
22: Hezekiah also had said, What is is the sign that I shall go up to the house of the LORD LORD ?
